---
title: "Olea"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in the genus *Olea* (Olives)

[Back to Tree Database](../index.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) | 0 | — |

- [*Olea europaea* Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) — 0 trees
